title: Add updatedAt field and rainbow table resistance test to User model
description: Add `updatedAt` field to the User interface in `src/auth/user-store.ts` and add a unit test verifying password hashing produces unique hashes each time (rainbow table resistance). The existing User interface already has `id`, `email`, `passwordHash`, `createdAt`, but is missing `updatedAt`. The existing tests verify password comparison but lack a test for unique hash generation per hashing operation.
existing_patterns: src/auth/user-store.ts: User interface with passwordHash, salt, hashPassword and verifyPassword methods using SHA-256
src/auth/user-store.test.ts: co-located vitest tests following describe/it conventions
